body:
[files]
extend-exclude = ["/CHANGELOG.md", "data/filetypes/base.lua", "demo/public/data/**"]

[default.extend-words]
noice = "noice"
fo = "fo"
ba = "ba"
ue = "ue"

fpr = "fpr"
FPR = "FPR"

thm = "thm"

comparsion = "comparsion"
modfiers = "modfiers"
shcema = "shcema"


tmplate = "tmplate"


isntall = "isntall"


thay = "thay"

[default]
extend-ignore-re = [

  "\\[[0-9a-f]{7}\\]",

  "(?Rm)^.*(#|--|//)\\s*spellchecker:disable-line$",

  "(?s)(#|--|//|)\\s*spellchecker:off.*?\\n\\s*(#|--|//)\\s*spellchecker:on",

  "vim:.+:"
]
